'''Opish & Bethal''' was an arms manufacturer.<ref name="GG2-2" /> The business contracted [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] to supply them with [[spin-sealed]] [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna gas]] from [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] in a highly secret agreement during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="GG2">''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref>
